thag3.14:1.1: While wandering on I went to hell;
thag3.14:1.2: went again & again to the world of the hungry ghosts;
thag3.14:1.4: in the pain of the animal womb;
thag3.14:2.2: went to heaven from time to time;
thag3.14:2.3: settled in the elements of form, the elements of formlessness,
thag3.14:3.1:
Ways of taking birth are now known:
devoid of essence,
thag3.14:3.3: Knowing them as born from my self,
thag3.14:3.4: mindful I went right to peace.
